details: On the main scenario, Time-Dependent DLCA should differ from Classical LCA when temporal distributions matter.
On the main scenario, SDD should be at least as high as Time-Dependent DLCA.
With a constant grid factor, the gap between Time-Dependent DLCA and Classical LCA should shrink in this POC.
The weekly Classical LCA profile is a reconstructed visualization under stationary assumptions, not a fully time-resolved Classical LCA.
